arts.sum: Liverpool are showing a strong interest in the potential transfer of Fulham left-back Antonee Robinson ahead of this summer, sources have told CaughtOffside. The USA international has impressed in the Premier League in recent times, contributing ten assists from left-back this season, and his performances have both Liverpool and Chelsea on alert.
